overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Ghost of Tsushima showing a samurai character walking along a sunlit beach. The character moves from dry sand through coastal vegetation and along the shoreline with traditional Japanese sailing ships visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: sunny coastal beach with vegetation border

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sandy beach with ocean on the left and coastal vegetation on the right

entered.detail: calm blue ocean with gentle waves lapping the shore
light-colored sand stretching along the coastline
green bushes and grasses growing on the dunes
rocky outcrop covered with trees rising above the beach
large wooden ships with sails anchored offshore

segments.scene_description: The samurai character walks along a sunlit beach with the ocean on the left and vegetation-covered dunes on the right. Traditional sailing ships are visible in the distance offshore, and the scene is bright and clear.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense coastal vegetation with sun flare

events.description: sun becomes visible through vegetation creating bright lens flare and backlighting

agents.ego_description: moving through dense coastal vegetation and bushes while ascending slightly

entered.detail: thick green bushes and tall grasses surrounding the path
bright sun creating lens flare through the vegetation

segments.scene_description: The character moves into dense coastal vegetation, ascending slightly through thick bushes. The sun becomes visible through the leaves creating a bright flare, and the ocean is temporarily obscured by the foliage.

scene_state.functional_zone: open beach with dead bodies and scavenging crows

events.description: exits dense vegetation back onto open beach revealing dead bodies on the sand
character turns toward the water and begins walking along the shoreline

agents.ego_description: descending back to the beach, passing dead bodies, and turning toward the shoreline

notable_agents.action: crows flying and landing near dead bodies scattered on the sand

entered.detail: dry sand with scattered debris and dead bodies
calm ocean water visible again as vegetation clears
fallen bodies lying on the sand suggesting recent combat

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the vegetation onto the open beach, the character passes dead bodies scattered on the sand with crows circling overhead. The character then turns toward the water and approaches the shoreline.

scene_state.functional_zone: shallow shoreline with distant ships and wooden piers

events.description: character steps into shallow water and continues walking along the waterline

agents.ego_description: walking along the shoreline in shallow water toward the distant ships

entered.detail: shallow ocean water covering the sand where the character walks
wooden docks and piers near the anchored ships

segments.scene_description: The character walks through the shallow water along the shoreline, with waves lapping at their feet. The sandy shore remains visible to the right while wooden piers and the sailing ships become more prominent ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a sunlit coastline that shifts from open sands through dense foliage and into a scene of coastal devastation. It begins with the samurai walking a bright, clear beach between the ocean and vegetation-covered dunes, with traditional sailing ships anchored in the distance. As the character moves inland, the view narrows into thick coastal bushes where the ocean is obscured and sunlight flares through the leaves. The scene then opens back onto the beach, passing scattered dead bodies and circling crows before the camera turns toward the water. Finally, the character enters the shallow surf, walking along the shoreline as the waves lap at their feet and the distant wooden piers and ships grow more prominent.
